        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engines_3 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = engines_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { engines_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_small_airframe = 1 popup = no }

# ── AIR / HEAVY_FIGHTERS (12 techs) ──

# iw_medium_airframe

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1936 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1947 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1950 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1955 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_medium_airframe_5
#   year=1960 branch=air category=heavy_fighters
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters = {
    # iw_medium_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { iw_medium_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_fighter1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_fighter1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_airframe — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { naval_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_technology = cv_naval_bomber1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }

        set_technology = { cv_naval_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }

    }
    # naval_bomber2 — 1940

            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }

    }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers

        set_technology = { cv_naval_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { naval_bomber3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cv_naval_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = cv_naval_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_bombers

#   year=1940 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# mothership_aircraft_tech_1
#   year=1942 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_large_airframe
#   year=1943 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# strategic_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# miniature_fighters
#   year=1944 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe
#   year=1945 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# mothership_aircraft_tech_2
#   year=1946 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe_2
#   year=1947 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_parasite_fighter
#   year=1949 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# jet_strategic_bomber1
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe_3
#   year=1950 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# mothership_aircraft_tech_3
#   year=1952 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe_4
#   year=1955 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# aerial_hangars
#   year=1957 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_large_airframe_5
#   year=1960 branch=air category=strategic_bombers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_air_strategic_bombers = {
    # iw_large_airframe — 1926
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = iw_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1926 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { iw_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_large_airframe — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mothership_aircraft_tech_0 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mothership_aircraft_tech_0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { mothership_aircraft_tech_0 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # reinforced_wings_mothership — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = reinforced_wings_mothership }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { reinforced_wings_mothership = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_large_airframe — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mothership_aircraft_tech_1 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mothership_aircraft_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { mothership_aircraft_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_large_airframe — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_bomber3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # miniature_fighters — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = miniature_fighters }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { miniature_fighters = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_large_airframe = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mothership_aircraft_tech_2 — 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mothership_aircraft_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { mothership_aircraft_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe_2 — 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_large_airframe_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_parasite_fighter — 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_parasite_fighter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_parasite_fighter = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_strategic_bomber1 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_strategic_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { jet_strategic_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe_3 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_large_airframe_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mothership_aircraft_tech_3 — 1952
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mothership_aircraft_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1952 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { mothership_aircraft_tech_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe_4 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_large_airframe_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # aerial_hangars — 1957
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = aerial_hangars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1957 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { aerial_hangars = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_large_airframe_5 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_large_airframe_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_strategic_bombers
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_large_airframe_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TACTICAL_BOMBERS (6 techs) ──

# early_bomber
#   year=1933 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber1
#   year=1936 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber2
#   year=1940 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# tactical_bomber3
#   year=1944 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber1
#   year=1945 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# jet_tactical_bomber2
#   year=1950 branch=air category=tactical_bombers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_air_tactical_bombers = {
    # early_bomber — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { early_bomber = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { tactical_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { tactical_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tactical_bomber3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tactical_bomber3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { tactical_bomber3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber1 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { jet_tactical_bomber1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_tactical_bomber2 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        set_technology = { jet_tactical_bomber2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── AIR / TRANSPORT (10 techs) ──

# early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_early_transport_plane
#   year=1933 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_improved_transport_plane
#   year=1936 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_transport_plane
#   year=1940 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# bba_strategic_airlifter
#   year=1942 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_4
#   year=1945 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# strategic_airlifter
#   year=1948 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_5
#   year=1950 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_6
#   year=1955 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# transport_plane_7
#   year=1960 branch=air category=transport
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_air_transport = {
    # early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        set_technology = { early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_early_transport_plane — 1933
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1933 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_early_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_improved_transport_plane — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_improved_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_transport_plane — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        set_technology = { improved_transport_plane = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bba_strategic_airlifter — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { bba_strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport_plane_4 — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = transport_plane_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { transport_plane_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # strategic_airlifter — 1948
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = strategic_airlifter }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1948 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        set_technology = { strategic_airlifter = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport_plane_5 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = transport_plane_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { transport_plane_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport_plane_6 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = transport_plane_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { transport_plane_6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # transport_plane_7 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = transport_plane_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_air >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_air_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { transport_plane_7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_industry_electronics_electronics = {
    # electronic_mechanical_engineering — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = electronic_mechanical_engineering }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { electronic_mechanical_engineering = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # radio — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { radio = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanical_computing — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanical_computing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_electronics
        }
        set_technology = { mechanical_computing = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_fire_control_system — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_fire_control_system }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry = {
    # basic_fortification_tech — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_fortification_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { basic_fortification_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coastal_fort_tech_1 — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { coastal_fort_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_machine_tools — 1936

            NOT = { has_technology = excavation4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        set_technology = { excavation4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # agriculture_2 — 1941

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / NUCLEAR (6 techs) ──

# atomic_research
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# isotope_separation_centrifugal
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nuclear_reactor_heavy_water
#   year=1943 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# nukes
#   year=1945 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# thermonuclear_bombs
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=nuclear
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear = {
    # atomic_research — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = atomic_research }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { atomic_research = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # isotope_separation_centrifugal — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { isotope_separation_centrifugal = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { nuclear_reactor = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_reactor_heavy_water — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { nuclear_reactor_heavy_water = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nukes — 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = nukes }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { nukes = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # thermonuclear_bombs — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = thermonuclear_bombs }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { thermonuclear_bombs = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── INDUSTRY_ELECTRONICS / RADAR (14 techs) ──

# radio_detection
#   year=1936 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# cavity_magnatron
#   year=1938 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# centimetric_radar
#   year=1940 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# phased_array
#   year=1941 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# monopulse_radar
#   year=1942 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_1
#   year=1944 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_2
#   year=1947 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_3
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# air_air_missile_2
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_2]

# naval_chaff
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# postwar_radar_tech_4
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# air_air_missile_3
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_3]

# postwar_radar_tech_5
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# air_air_missile_4
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=radar
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_radar = {
    # radio_detection — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = radio_detection }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { radio_detection = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # cavity_magnatron — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = cavity_magnatron }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { cavity_magnatron = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # centimetric_radar — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = centimetric_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { centimetric_radar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # phased_array — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = phased_array }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { phased_array = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # monopulse_radar — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = monopulse_radar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { monopulse_radar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # postwar_radar_tech_1 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = postwar_radar_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { postwar_radar_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # postwar_radar_tech_2 — 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = postwar_radar_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { postwar_radar_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # postwar_radar_tech_3 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = postwar_radar_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { postwar_radar_tech_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # air_air_missile_2 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = air_air_missile_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_2
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { air_air_missile_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_chaff — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_chaff }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { naval_chaff = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # postwar_radar_tech_4 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = postwar_radar_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { postwar_radar_tech_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # air_air_missile_3 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = air_air_missile_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_3
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { air_air_missile_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # postwar_radar_tech_5 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = postwar_radar_tech_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
        }
        set_technology = { postwar_radar_tech_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # air_air_missile_4 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = air_air_missile_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_radar
            has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        set_technology = { air_air_missile_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# motorized_rocket_unit_3
#   year=1950 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[rocket_artillery]

# interceptor_engine_3
#   year=1951 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_guidance_3
#   year=1953 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# slcm_tech_1
#   year=1953 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_e
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_flying_bomb_4
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_sam_missile_3
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_nuclear_missile_2
#   year=1955 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
#   year=1957 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# slcm_tech_2
#   year=1957 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_flying_bomb_5
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_sam_missile_4
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_nuclear_missile_3
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# sp_slbm_1
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85

# rocket_artillery_f
#   year=1960 branch=industry_electronics category=rockets
#   min_tier=superpower min_branch_score=85 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

arm_grant_industry_electronics_rockets = {
    # hardened_silo — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = hardened_silo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { hardened_silo = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorized_rocket_unit — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = rocket_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { motorized_rocket_unit = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { rocket_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery2 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { rocket_artillery2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery3 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { rocket_artillery3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # experimental_rockets — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = experimental_rockets }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { experimental_rockets = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_nuclear_missile_2 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_nuclear_missile_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { sp_nuclear_missile_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4 — 1957
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1957 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # slcm_tech_2 — 1957
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = slcm_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1957 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { slcm_tech_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_flying_bomb_5 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_flying_bomb_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { sp_flying_bomb_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_sam_missile_4 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_sam_missile_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { sp_sam_missile_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_nuclear_missile_3 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_nuclear_missile_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { sp_nuclear_missile_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_slbm_1 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_slbm_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        set_technology = { sp_slbm_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rocket_artillery_f — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = rocket_artillery_f }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
            has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
        }
        set_technology = { rocket_artillery_f = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / ANTI_AIR (13 techs) ──

# infantry_aa
#   year=1025 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_a
#   year=1944 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_b
#   year=1947 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_c
#   year=1949 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_d
#   year=1950 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15 deps=[postwar_radar_tech_2]

# antiair_e
#   year=1955 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_f
#   year=1960 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air = {
    # infantry_aa — 1025
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_aa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1025 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
        }
        set_technology = { infantry_aa = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antiair — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { interwar_antiair = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_a — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair_a = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_b — 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair_b = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_c — 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_c }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair_c = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_d — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_d }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
            has_technology = postwar_radar_tech_2
        }
        set_technology = { antiair_d = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_e — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair_e = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_f — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antiair_f }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        set_technology = { antiair_f = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1950 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_e
#   year=1960 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

    # mountain_tanks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { mountain_tanks = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank — 1936

            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_a — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_a }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank_a = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_b — 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_c — 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_c }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank_c = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_f — 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_f }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
            has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_2
        }
        set_technology = { antitank_f = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_d — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_d }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank_d = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_e — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = antitank_e }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        set_technology = { antitank_e = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# artillery2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_shock_hardening_techniques
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery

#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery

# improved_heavy_shell
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15
