#   year=1943 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_a
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_heavy_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_dp_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_b
#   year=1947 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_c
#   year=1949 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_d
#   year=1950 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# modern_dp_light_battery
#   year=1950 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_e
#   year=1955 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery_f
#   year=1960 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery = {
    # gw_artillery — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { gw_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battery — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # adv_gw_artillery — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = adv_gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { adv_gw_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_artillery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = interwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { interwar_artillery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_battery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_shell — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_shell }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_shell = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_battery — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        set_technology = { basic_heavy_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_shell — 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_shell }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_shell = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # railway_gun — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { railway_gun = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 — 1939

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { artillery1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_battery — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_battery = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_battery — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { artillery2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery3 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { artillery3 = 1 popup = no }

    # sp_shock_hardening_techniques — 1941

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { sp_shock_hardening_techniques = 1 popup = no }

    # artillery4 — 1942

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { sp_variable_time_fuze_shells = 1 popup = no }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_shell }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

    }
    # improved_heavy_shell — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_shell }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_shell = 1 popup = no }

    # artillery5 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = artillery5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        set_technology = { artillery5 = 1 popup = no }

# ── LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (16 techs) ──

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tank_chassis_4
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tank_chassis_5
#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tank_chassis_6
#   year=1950 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks = {
    # basic_heavy_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { super_heavy_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }

            NOT = { has_technology = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_tank_chassis_6 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_tank_chassis_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_tank_chassis_6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry = {
    # infantry_weapons — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { infantry_weapons = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { support_weapons = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_technology = survival_training }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        set_technology = { survival_training = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons4 — 1942

            NOT = { has_technology = support_weapons4 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }

# ── LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (11 techs) ──

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# paradrop_tank_chassis
#   year=1938 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[paras_airborne_light_armor]

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# modern_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1950 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# paradrop_tank_chassis_2
#   year=1950 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[paradrop_tank_chassis]

arm_grant_land_light_tanks = {
    # gwtank — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { gwtank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { gwtank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # paradrop_tank_chassis — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = paradrop_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = paras_airborne_light_armor
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { paradrop_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_light_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_light_tank_chassis — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_light_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # paradrop_tank_chassis_2 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = paradrop_tank_chassis_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_technology = paradrop_tank_chassis
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { paradrop_tank_chassis_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── LAND / MECHANISED (11 techs) ──

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1944 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry4
#   year=1947 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry5
#   year=1950 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry6
#   year=1953 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3
#   year=1953 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry7
#   year=1960 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ifv_infantry
#   year=1960 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised = {
    # mechanised_infantry — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry4 — 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry5 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry6 — 1953
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1953 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 — 1953
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1953 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { amphibious_mechanized_infantry_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry7 — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = mechanised_infantry7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { mechanised_infantry7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ifv_infantry — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ifv_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        set_technology = { ifv_infantry = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank

#   year=1960 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis — 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { basic_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis — 1940

            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_medium_tank_chassis = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank — 1941

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        set_technology = { improved_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank — 1943

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

        set_technology = { advanced_medium_tank = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis_2 — 1947

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

        }
        set_technology = { main_battle_tank_chassis_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis_3 — 1950

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry_2
#   year=1941 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry_3
#   year=1950 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised = {
    # tech_trucks — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        set_technology = { tech_trucks = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        set_technology = { motorised_infantry = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry_2 — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        set_technology = { motorised_infantry_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry_3 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = motorised_infantry_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        set_technology = { motorised_infantry_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# tech_field_hospital5
#   year=1950 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=15 deps=[health_4]

# night_vision2
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_engineers6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_recon6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_military_police6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_maintenance_company6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_logistics_company6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_signal_company6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# diesel_electric_locomotives
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_field_hospital6
#   year=1955 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=15 deps=[health_5]

arm_grant_land_support = {
    # basic_train — 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { basic_train = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_support — 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_support = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_engineers = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_recon = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_military_police }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_military_police = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_train — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armored_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { armored_train = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon_focus_bonus — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_recon_focus_bonus }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_recon_focus_bonus = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

    # tech_military_police6 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_military_police6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_military_police6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company6 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_maintenance_company6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_maintenance_company6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company6 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_logistics_company6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_logistics_company6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company6 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_signal_company6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { tech_signal_company6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # diesel_electric_locomotives — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = diesel_electric_locomotives }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        set_technology = { diesel_electric_locomotives = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital6 — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = tech_field_hospital6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_technology = health_5
        }
        set_technology = { tech_field_hospital6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic = {
    # armored_car1 — 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { armored_car1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_td = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_art = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_spaa — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_spaa = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_td — 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_td = 1 popup = no }

    }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        set_technology = { engine_tech_1 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_technology = engine_tech_2 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic

            NOT = { has_technology = armored_car2 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
