    }
}

# ── NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (25 techs) ──

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# pre_dreadnoughts
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# coastal_defense_ships
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy_2
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_heavy_5
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_asm_battery_1_tech
#   year=1955 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech
#   year=1955 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_dp_missile_battery_1_tech
#   year=1955 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech, ship_asm_battery_1_tech]

# ship_dp_missile_battery_2_tech
#   year=1955 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech, ship_asm_battery_2_tech]

# ship_asm_battery_2_tech
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

# ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4]

arm_grant_naval_battleships = {
    # early_battlecruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { early_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { early_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_heavy — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battleship — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { basic_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_heavy — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # pre_dreadnoughts — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = pre_dreadnoughts }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { pre_dreadnoughts = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # coastal_defense_ships — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = coastal_defense_ships }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { coastal_defense_ships = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_heavy — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy_2 — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_super_heavy_2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    # basic_battlecruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { basic_battlecruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_battleship — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { improved_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_heavy — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_heavy = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_battleship — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_battleship = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship2 — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = heavy_battleship2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        set_technology = { heavy_battleship2 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_heavy_5 — 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_heavy_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_heavy_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_asm_battery_1_tech — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_asm_battery_1_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_asm_battery_1_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_dp_missile_battery_1_tech — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_dp_missile_battery_1_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_technology = ship_sam_missile_battery_1_tech
            has_technology = ship_asm_battery_1_tech
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_dp_missile_battery_1_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_dp_missile_battery_2_tech — 1955
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_dp_missile_battery_2_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1955 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_technology = ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech
            has_technology = ship_asm_battery_2_tech
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_dp_missile_battery_2_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_asm_battery_2_tech — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_asm_battery_2_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_asm_battery_2_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech — 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_technology = sp_rockets_improved_guidance_4
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_sam_missile_battery_2_tech = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / CARRIERS (14 techs) ──

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_escort_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_carrier_4
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_carrier_5
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_carrier_6
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers = {
    # early_carrier — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        set_technology = { early_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_carrier — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        set_technology = { basic_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_carrier — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_escort_carrier — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_escort_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_escort_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_carrier — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        set_technology = { improved_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_refined_pykrete — 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_refined_pykrete = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_carrier — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_ice_composite_runawayas — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sp_ice_composite_runawayas = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_carrier_4 — 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_carrier_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_carrier_4 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_carrier_5 — 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_carrier_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_carrier_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_carrier_6 — 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_carrier_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_carrier_6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / DESTROYERS (24 techs) ──

# early_destroyer

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_light
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# smoke_generator
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_depth_charges
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sonar
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_destroyer
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_light
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_depth_charges
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# improved_sonar
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_light
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_depth_charges
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# improved_destroyer
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_sonar
#   year=1941 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_light
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_depth_charges
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_light_5
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# depth_charges_5
#   year=1949 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# modern_sonar
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ship_hull_light_6
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# depth_charges_6
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# ship_hull_light_7
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# towed_sonar
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# depth_charges_7
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

arm_grant_naval_destroyers = {
    # early_destroyer — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        set_technology = { early_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_light — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # smoke_generator — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { smoke_generator = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
    # sonar — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_destroyer — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        set_technology = { basic_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_light — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    # improved_sonar — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_light — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # improved_destroyer — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        set_technology = { improved_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_sonar — 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_light — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_light = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
    # advanced_destroyer — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_destroyer = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_light_5 — 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_light_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_light_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): depth_charges_5
    # modern_sonar — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { modern_sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_light_6 — 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_light_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_light_6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): depth_charges_6
    # ship_hull_light_7 — 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_light_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_light_7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # towed_sonar — 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = towed_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { towed_sonar = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): depth_charges_7
}

# ── NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (5 techs) ──

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers = {
    # early_heavy_cruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { early_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # basic_heavy_cruiser — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { basic_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { improved_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_heavy_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# ── NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (12 techs) ──

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_light_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1949 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ship_hull_cruiser_6
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# ship_hull_helicopter_carrier
#   year=1954 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[early_ship_hull_carrier, naval_helicopter_1]

# ship_hull_cruiser_7
#   year=1958 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers = {
    # early_light_cruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { early_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_cruiser — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { basic_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser — 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_cruiser — 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { improved_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_cruiser — 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { improved_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser — 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_ship_hull_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_cruiser — 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_light_cruiser = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_cruiser_5 — 1949
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_cruiser_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1949 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_cruiser_5 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_cruiser_6 — 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_cruiser_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_cruiser_6 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_helicopter_carrier — 1954
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_helicopter_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
            has_technology = naval_helicopter_1
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_helicopter_carrier = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_cruiser_7 — 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_cruiser_7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_cruiser_7 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_naval_support = {
    # transport — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = transport }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        set_technology = { transport = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_torpedo — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_torpedo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_torpedo = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_naval_mines — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = basic_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { basic_naval_mines = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # submarine_mine_laying — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = submarine_mine_laying }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }

    }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): asw_torpedo
    # advanced_submarine_mine_laying — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = advanced_submarine_mine_laying }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { advanced_submarine_mine_laying = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_mines_1950 — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_mines_1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { naval_mines_1950 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # naval_mines_1950b — 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = naval_mines_1950b }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }

    # adv_tank_landing_craft — 1950

            NOT = { has_technology = adv_tank_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

        set_technology = { landing_platform_helicopter = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_naval_submarines = {
    # early_submarine — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        set_technology = { early_submarine = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_submarine — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { early_ship_hull_submarine = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # midget_submarine — 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = midget_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

    }

            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_fleet_submarine_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1954 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_fleet_submarine_3 = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_sail
    # ship_hull_rocket_submarine — 1956
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_rocket_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1956 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_rocket_submarine = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_nuclear_attack_sub — 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_nuclear_attack_sub }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_nuclear_attack_sub = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_missile_submarine — 1958
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_technology = ship_hull_missile_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1958 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        set_technology = { ship_hull_missile_submarine = 1 popup = no }
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}
